name: Pool Merge Io
author: Poki
description: Get ready to dominate the leaderboards with Pool Merge Io! This is a snake .io game with a pool table theme, where you can collect balls with a smaller number than yours in order to become the biggest threat in the lobby. Dodge and weave around enemies that have a higher number than yours, and chase down smaller enemies in order to grow further. Be on the lookout for fun power-ups that can assist you in your constant climb up the leaderboards. The more you play, the more cosmetic options you can unlock for your ball, table, and avatar! Do you have what it takes to conquer the pool table? How do I play Pool Merge Io? Merge with any ball that has a smaller number than yours to grow. Change your direction by moving your mouse cursor. Left Mouse Button: Increase your movement speed. Who created Pool Merge Io? Pool Merge Io is created by Gamebole Studios. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Pool Merge Io for free? You can play Pool Merge Io for free on Poki. Can I play Pool Merge Io on mobile devices and desktop? Pool Merge Io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
